_comment: Content of fundings.html — one object per funded project, newest / most important first. Fields: title, program (funding scheme), period, status ('active'|'completed'), description (1-2 sentences), objective (1-2 sentences, shown highlighted), image (single explanatory figure in img/), universities [..], agencies [..], amount (optional, '' hides), href (optional project link, '' hides), pillars (optional core pillars: [{title, text}], shown as a compact grid), results (optional list of top results: type is a short label like 'Prize'|'Article'|'Workshop', text is a brief description, href optional link, '' hides the arrow).

fundings.title: CHARISM — Japan-UK Centre for Human-Oriented AI and Robotics in Inclusive and Sustainable Manufacturing
fundings.program: JST ASPIRE · EPSRC — Japan-UK Joint Call on Artificial Intelligence and Information
fundings.description: A five-year Japan-UK research centre exploring how intelligent machines and people can collaborate in manufacturing. CHARISM combines AI, robotics, and data science to support production that is flexible and low-waste while keeping workers — their capabilities, wellbeing, and rights — at the centre of the factory of the future.
fundings.objective: Transform how AI and robotics are used in manufacturing: moving beyond automation that replaces people toward hybrid human-machine collaboration that makes industry more inclusive and sustainable.
universities: AIST — National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology (Japan)
agencies: EPSRC — Engineering and Physical Sciences Research Council (UK)

pillars.title: Hybrid Collective Intelligence
pillars.text: AI-human coordination that enables flexible, low-waste production — machines and people deciding together, not machines deciding alone.

pillars.title: Measuring Human Wellbeing
pillars.text: Tracking the mental and physical wellbeing of workers in human-AI work environments, making wellbeing a first-class engineering metric.

pillars.title: Ethics and Trust
pillars.text: Designing AI systems that are explainable, fair, and responsive, so trust between people and intelligent machines can be earned and verified.

fundings.objective: EDIT ME — the objective this project pursued and achieved.

results.text: EDIT ME — brief description of a prize or award obtained through this project.
